{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Administration and Welfare Manager",
  "description": "Roemichs is the foremost international school in Kwara State offering a hybrid British/Nigerian curriculum to both national and international students from Cr&egrave;che to post WAEC. It prepares students for both national and international examinations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administration and Welfare Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ilorin, Kwara&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	A resourceful and energetic person is needed to serve in this role in an international school which has both day and boarding scholars.
	Previous experience in the field is a must.
	The post is a residential post with dingle accommodation provided on site.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their formal letter of application and an updated CV to:&nbsp;roemichsschool@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
Or
Send their Applications in a sealed envelope.",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-11",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-12",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Roemichs"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

Administration and Welfare Manager Job at Roemichs




        
    

        
        Roemichs is the foremost international school in Kwara State offering a hybrid British/Nigerian curriculum to both national and international students from Crèche to post WAEC. It prepares students for both national and international examinations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administration and Welfare Manager

Job Location: Ilorin, Kwara 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A resourceful and energetic person is needed to serve in this role in an international school which has both day and boarding scholars.
	Previous experience in the field is a must.
	The post is a residential post with dingle accommodation provided on site.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their formal letter of application and an updated CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
Or
Send their Applications in a sealed envelope.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Representative",
  "description": "Grey Hales Concepts Limited is a professional financial services firm based in Lagos, Nigeria. The company specializes in loan administration, credit management, and financial operations support. With a strong commitment to integrity, efficiency, and customer satisfaction, Grey Hales Concepts Ltd provides structured financial solutions tailored to individuals and businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	&lrm;Keep front desk tidy and presentable with all necessary material (pens, forms, paper etc.)
	&lrm;Greet and welcome guests
	&lrm;Answer questions and address complaints
	&lrm;Answer all incoming calls and redirect them or keep messages
	&lrm;Receive letters, packages etc. and distribute them
	&lrm;Prepare outgoing mail by drafting correspondence, securing parcels etc.
	&lrm;Check, sort and forward emails
	&lrm;Monitor office supplies and place orders when necessary
	&lrm;Keep updated records and files
	&lrm;Monitor office expenses and costs
	&lrm;Take up other duties as assigned (travel arrangements, schedules etc.).


&lrm;&lrm;Requirements


	&lrm;Familiarity with office machines (e.g. fax, printer etc.)
	&lrm;Knowledge of office management and basic bookkeeping
	&lrm;Proficient in English (oral and written)
	&lrm;Excellent knowledge of MS Office (especially Excel and Word)
	&lrm;Strong communication and people skills
	&lrm;Good organizational and multi-tasking abilities
	&lrm;Problem-solving skills
	&lrm;Customer service orientation.


&nbsp;Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;greyhaleslimited@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-03-26",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Front Desk Representative Job at Grey Hales Concepts Limited




        
    

        
        Grey Hales Concepts Limited is a professional financial services firm based in Lagos, Nigeria. The company specializes in loan administration, credit management, and financial operations support. With a strong commitment to integrity, efficiency, and customer satisfaction, Grey Hales Concepts Ltd provides structured financial solutions tailored to individuals and businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Representative

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	‎Keep front desk tidy and presentable with all necessary material (pens, forms, paper etc.)
	‎Greet and welcome guests
	‎Answer questions and address complaints
	‎Answer all incoming calls and redirect them or keep messages
	‎Receive letters, packages etc. and distribute them
	‎Prepare outgoing mail by drafting correspondence, securing parcels etc.
	‎Check, sort and forward emails
	‎Monitor office supplies and place orders when necessary
	‎Keep updated records and files
	‎Monitor office expenses and costs
	‎Take up other duties as assigned (travel arrangements, schedules etc.).


‎‎Requirements


	‎Familiarity with office machines (e.g. fax, printer etc.)
	‎Knowledge of office management and basic bookkeeping
	‎Proficient in English (oral and written)
	‎Excellent knowledge of MS Office (especially Excel and Word)
	‎Strong communication and people skills
	‎Good organizational and multi-tasking abilities
	‎Problem-solving skills
	‎Customer service orientation.


 Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
